question: When arriving at Heathrow Airport from another country, what document must you present to the border forces?
response: When arriving at Heathrow Airport from another country, you must present a valid passport to the border forces. Depending on your nationality and purpose of visit, additional documents such as a visa or proof of enrollment in a course (e.g., a letter from an educational institution) may also be required.

Content: When arriving at Heathrow Airport from another country, you must present a valid passport to the border forces.
